member.name: T:Prime.PatternService.Internal.IPatternService
member.summary: Internal methods.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.Internal.IPatternService.GetPattern(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets a pattern object for the given pattern name.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.Internal.IPatternService.GetCachingBehavior(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the current caching behavior.

member.name: T:Prime.PatternService.Internal.IPattern
member.summary: Pattern interface.

member.name: P:Prime.PatternService.Internal.IPattern.Name
member.summary: Gets pattern name.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.Internal.IPattern.GetDomains
member.summary: Domains.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.Internal.IPattern.GetLabelAddress(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Label address.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.Internal.IPattern.GetLabels(System.String)
member.summary: gets labels.

member.name: T:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService
member.summary: Searches label in pattern and returns the label name and address.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService.SetCachingBehavior(Prime.PlatformService.Internal.CachingBehavior,System.UInt64,System.UInt64,System.UInt64,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets the pattern operations cache behavior and size.
member.param: Caching behavior for the pattern modify and pattern reads operations.
Capacity of the pattern memory cache. If more than capacity regions are cached the least recently used region is evicted from the cache.
Maximum amount of vectors in the pattern memory cache. If more than maxVectorCountInCache vectors are in the cache the least recently used region gets evicted from the cache.
Maximum size of an entry to be accepted into the cache.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService.GetLabelFromAddress(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get the closest label name and address, to the provided pattern, domain, address and direction of search. Note that if there is a label on the same address that is provided through 'searchAtAddress' parameter, it will be returned regardless of the search direction. Function will throw FatalException if function failed to find closest label, or if TOS API failed for any reason.
member.param: Name of the pattern where Label has to be searched.
Search address of the pattern where the label need to be searched.
If true, it will search for the closest label before the provided address ('searchAtAddress' parameter), Otherwise(false), it will search after the provided address('searchAtAddress' parameter).
member.returns: Returns ILabel Object, that holds LabelName and address, use GetName and GetAddress to get the information.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService.GetLabels(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all the labels that match the pattern name, the label name and the domain name.
member.param: Name of the pattern where Label has to be searched.
Label regex of the pattern to look for.
member.returns: A vector containing all the Label objects matches the label name for the given pattern name and domain name.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService.ReadPinData(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Read Data for a list of Pins at a specific pattern.
member.param: Pattern name to read data from.
A list of pins to read data from.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Map where the key in pin name and the value is the data for this pin.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService.ReadInstruction(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Read Data for a list of Pins at a specific pattern.
member.param: Pattern name to read data from.
The address to read instruction data from.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Pair first value is the instruction and the second value is the instruction arguments.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService.ReadCtv(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Read CTV Data at a specific pattern and Domain.
member.param: Pattern name to read data from.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService.ReadMTV(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Read MTV Data at a specific pattern and Domain.
member.param: Pattern name to read data from.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService.GetVectorAddressForLabel(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Read vector address for specific label, domain in the pattern.
member.param: Pattern name to read data from.

member.name: M:Prime.PatternService.IPatternService.ReadLRPT(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Read LRPT Data at a specific pattern and Domain at specific address.
member.param: Pattern name to read data from.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Get all domains in pattern.
